Maria Biscanna

Medium Elf (Wood), Druid level 1

Armor Class

15 (Studded Leather Armor)

Hit Points

10/10 (1d8)

Speed

35 ft.

Saving Throws

Intelligence +2, Wisdom +5

Skills

Arcana +2, Insight +5, Nature +2, Perception +5, Survival +5

Languages

You can speak, read, and write Common and Elvish. Elvish is fluid, with subtle intonations and intricate grammar. Elven literature is rich and varied, and their songs and poems are famous among other races. Many bards learn their language so they can add Elvish ballads to their repertoires.

Actions

Scimitar. 

Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1d6 + 3 slashing damage.

Longbow. 

Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 1d8 + 3 piercing damage.
